copywriting.hero_title: Trusted Rooftop Solar Installer in Jaipur
copywriting.hero_subtitle: Lower your JVVNL electricity bills with heat-resistant solar systems custom-designed for Jaipur homes, commercial buildings, and schools.
copywriting.about_title: Empowering Jaipur with High-Yield Solar Energy
copywriting.about_text: At Sharma Solar Solutions, led by Rajesh Sharma, we help Jaipur residents and businesses beat rising Rajasthan electricity rates. We design and install high-generation solar systems in Malviya Nagar, Vaishali Nagar, Mansarovar, and Sitapura. We take care of all JVVNL net-metering paperwork and central subsidy processing, ensuring maximum return on your investment.

services.title: Residential Solar Rooftop
services.description: Lower your monthly JVVNL bills. Perfect for Jaipur homes and residential villas looking to secure government subsidies with complete net-metering installations.

services.title: Commercial & Industrial Solar
services.description: Reduce overheads and claim tax benefits with customized solar arrays for schools, hotels, offices, or manufacturing units in Sitapura Industrial Area.

services.title: Solar Water Pumps
services.description: Grid-independent solar pumps for farm tubewells around Chomu and rural Jaipur districts, ensuring steady irrigation without power cuts.

testimonials.name: Aditya Chaturvedi
testimonials.quote: Sharma Solar Solutions installed an 8kW system for our home in Vaishali Nagar. Our monthly JVVNL bill went from ₹8,500 to just ₹650. Rajesh and his team were highly professional and finished everything within 10 days.

testimonials.name: Suresh Singhal
testimonials.quote: Running a printing facility in Sitapura has high power requirements. Sharma Solar Solutions designed and set up a 30kW rooftop solar system. It cut our bills in half and we have already claimed our tax depreciation benefits.

faqs.question: What government subsidy is available for residential solar in Jaipur?
faqs.question_localized: What government subsidy is available for residential solar in Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Under the national PM Surya Ghar portal, homeowners in Rajasthan can claim up to ₹78,000 in central subsidies for a 3kW system. Our team manages the entire application and inspection documentation for you.

faqs.question: Do solar panels perform well during Jaipur's extreme summer heat?
faqs.question_localized: Do solar panels perform well during Jaipur's extreme summer heat?
faqs.answer: Yes. We source high-efficiency Tier-1 monocrystalline half-cut panels that feature a low temperature coefficient. They are specifically engineered to maintain stable power generation even in peak summer temperatures.
